description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding, with contrasting trim around the windows and doors. The house includes a single-car attached garage with a driveway, and large, symmetrically arranged windows on both floors provide ample natural light. The roof is primarily flat with a slight pitch, and the property is set on a neatly manicured green lawn. The rear and side elevations show additional entry points and more windows, maintaining a balanced and orderly appearance. The overall design is practical and modern, suitable for a family in an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, attached garage, front porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn. The exterior features horizontal siding and prominent trim details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a porch, columns, paved walkway, and attached garage with a car parked in the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, large windows, and the continuation of the flat roof and siding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage door, side windows, and the paved path leading to the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, supported by columns, accessed by a paved walkway and flanked by decorative trim.
